gemma2-cosmos.description: Turkish fine-tuned Gemma 2 9B by YTU COSMOS Lab
gemma2-cosmos.notes: Fits comfortably on 32GB GPU in full precision

gemma3-12b.notes: Tight on 32GB — use max_model_len=4096 and gpu_memory_utilization=0.92

gemma4-12b.notes: Same VRAM profile as Gemma 3 12B. Verify HF repo ID when released.
